## What this changes

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes.
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds.
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or `.env` values added anywhere.
- [ ] Keys stay client-side (no build-time secret injection reintroduced).
- [ ] No em dashes in code or docs (use `-`, `:`, or `.`).
- [ ] Verified the change in the running app where relevant.
